title: Mobbility [Core]
description: Give mobs player abilities - spell casting with animations and cooldowns, dodging, and more. Core mod with shared functionality for Mobbility addons.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Es8xro21/images/cd43679ddfac3327c71108201f38ac8905651244.png)

## What is Mobbility?

Mobbility [Mob Ability] - a modular mod that gives mobs the same abilities players have. Mobs can cast spells with animations and cooldowns, dodge attacks, and use combat mechanics just like players do. 

**Important**: The core mod provides shared functionality and commands. All major features are implemented in addons - you must install at least one addon for the mod to do anything useful.

## Available Addons

Mobbility uses an addon system. Install the core mod + any addons for mods you have:

### Magic Addons
- **[Mobbility [Addon: Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks]](https://modrinth.com/mod/mobbility-addon-irons-spells-n-spellbooks)** (Forge) - Wizard AI with spell casting
- **[Mobbility [Addon: Spell Engine]](https://modrinth.com/mod/mobbility-addon-spell-engine)** (Fabric) - Alternative spell system integration

### Combat Addons
- **[Mobbility [Addon: Combat Roll]](https://modrinth.com/mod/mobbility-addon-combat-roll)** (Fabric/Forge) - Mob dodging mechanics

## How It Works

Mobs automatically gain new abilities when they spawn with appropriate items. Configure behavior via in-game config menus.

## Requirements

- **Minecraft**: 1.20.1
- **Fabric Loader**: 0.15.11+ (for Fabric version)
- **Forge**: 1.20.1-47.4.10+ (for Forge version)
- **Mob Player Animator**: Required for mob animations
- **Fzzy Config**: Required for configuration

## Configuration

Core and addons use TOML configuration files in `config/mobbility/`:
- `mobbility.toml` - Core settings
- `irons_spellbooks.toml` - Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks addon
- `spellcategories.toml` - Spell categories for Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
- `spell_engine.toml` - Spell Engine addon
- `combat_roll.toml` - Combat Roll addon

Access via Mod Menu (Fabric) or Forge config menu.

## Commands

```
/mobbility spawn <mobType> <presetName> [position]
/mobbility debug polygon spawn <presetMobs> <golems>
/mobbility debug polygon despawn
```
